title: Named Entity Recognition with BIO Tagging
description: Interactive p5.js MicroSim that labels each token in a sentence with BIO tags, showing how NER models mark entity boundaries and types.
creator: Dan McCreary
author: Dan McCreary
subject: Conversational AI
learningObjective: Demonstrate how NER models label each token in a sequence with BIO tags to identify entity boundaries and types

educational.topic: Named entity recognition and BIO tagging
learningObjectives: Demonstrate how NER models label each token with B-, I-, or O tags
Identify entity boundaries and types from token-level labels
educational.prerequisites: Tokenization and the concept of named entities

pedagogical.interactionType: Dropdown, toggles, custom-sentence input, and hover tooltips

controls.label: Example sentence
controls.purpose: Choose one of five pre-labeled sentences
